free_text: 这款 SKINTIFIC 气垫真的有惊喜！上脸是柔雾哑光妆效，遮瑕力很不错，毛孔和小瑕疵都能自然隐形。质地轻盈不厚重，妆感干净利落。控油效果也很稳，我在马来西亚的湿热天气下用了一整天，T区只微微出油但不脱妆。色号「Petal」自然不假白，很适合亚洲肤色。包装小巧方便携带，补妆也很方便。 This SKINTIFIC cushion really impressed me! free_text: As someone living in the perpetual heat and humidity place, finding a cushion foundation that delivers on coverage without melting off or feeling like a heavy mask is a constant challenge. Shade 03A Almond is a beautiful match for light-to-medium skin with warm or neutral-warm undertones. It doesn’t pull too yellow or too pink, striking a nice, natural balance. Upon initial application, the shade was a perfect fit for my skin tone. The formula is incredibly lightweight and spreads with ease. A few gentle taps with the puff are enough to cover a large area. It blends seamlessly into the skin without needing much effort. ​With just one light layer, it provided solid medium coverage, effectively evening out my skin tone and toning down the redness around my nose. It’s also very buildable. I added a second, thinner layer over some darker spots, and it built up to near-full coverage without looking cakey or thick.

author: s*****i
tags: {'Texture': 'matte on its own', 'Coverage': 'medium coverage, buildable'}
free_text: Arrived safely and quicker than I thought, packaged nicely, thank you ❤️  It held up throughout the day, which is impressive (high humidity heat).
